description: Governance event record. Append-only. No content payloads.

sequence.description: Ordinal within log file. Starts at 1.

previous_hash.description: SHA-256 of raw JSON string of previous entry. 'genesis' for first entry.

severity.description: Invariant violations must be high or critical.

invariant.description: Required when type=block and invariant was violated.

resource.description: Path pattern only. No file content.
